feature.label: Redis Service Feature
feature.description: Redis-backed implementation of the org.idempiere.distributed cache, messaging, and cluster services. Sibling to org.idempiere.hazelcast.service.feature; install one OR the other, not both. Targets clustered/containerized deployments where the embedded Hazelcast peer-cluster model is incompatible with rolling deploys, autoscaling, and ephemeral compute.
